The Carrot Thief

About

Creative
Technologist

I'm Harsh Kumar — designer & developer studying Digital Media Connect at Northeastern University Vancouver (grad Dec 2027). Background in CS engineering + manufacturing at Honda of Canada.

I work at the intersection of AI content pipelines, motion design, web animation, and cinematic storytelling — building experiences that don't just look good, they move people.

Running two creative brands: @marbella.motion and @code.glitchh. Open to co-op & design/dev work in Vancouver.

Tools

A blend of design intuition, storytelling craft, and technical execution. I don't just make things pretty — I make them work.

How I Work

The Process

01
Discover

Deep-dive into the brief. Research the audience, context, and what story needs to be told — and why it matters.

02
Design

Wireframes, mood boards, motion tests. Every element earns its place. UX-first thinking, cinematic output.

03
Build

Code it, animate it, bring it to life. Whether a scrolling narrative site or an AI film pipeline — I build what I design.

04
Launch

Deploy, iterate, tell the story. The work isn't done when it ships — it's done when it resonates.

Let's build something unforgettable
